onboarding.actions.installExtensionAria: Install the Octo browser extension and open Chrome Web Store
onboarding.intro.actions.skipAria: Skip onboarding and enter the main page
onboarding.intro.hero.subtitle: Where humans and AI Agents work as one team
onboarding.intro.hero.title: Octo is an AI-native collaboration platform
onboarding.intro.meanings.context.descri: Work context stays protected, traceable, and ready for Agents to act on.
onboarding.intro.meanings.context.title: Context
onboarding.intro.meanings.open.descripti: Open source and self-hostable, so your data stays under your control.
onboarding.intro.meanings.open.title: Open
Humans, AI Agents, and tools coordinate through one collaboration layer.
onboarding.intro.meanings.taste.descript: AI can think and execute; humans bring taste, judgment, and lived context.
onboarding.intro.meanings.taste.title: Taste
onboarding.sections.createBot.descriptio: Go to BotFather, create your first Bot, and start experiencing Octo.
onboarding.sections.createBot.label: Create your Bot
onboarding.sections.createBot.title: Create your Bot
onboarding.sections.createBot.visualTitl: Cursor hovering over the BotFather entry
onboarding.sections.browserExtension.des:
Octo stays beside the page you are on.
Keep using GitHub, Feishu Docs, and your other tools while collaborating with your team and AI in Octo.
onboarding.sections.browserExtension.tit: Connect to Octo from the browser you already use
onboarding.sections.favorites.descriptio:
Favorites is your personal entry point for important work.
Keep key customers, long-running projects, and active tasks here so they stay easy to find.
onboarding.sections.favorites.label: Favorites
onboarding.sections.favorites.title: Keep key work in Favorites
onboarding.sections.groupMd.description:
Do not guess from chat history how this channel works.
The owner or an administrator writes the channel goals, key resources, and collaboration rules in GROUP.md.
New members and AI Agents read it first to understand the context and rules before starting work.
onboarding.sections.groupMd.label: GROUP.md
onboarding.sections.groupMd.title: Align teams with GROUP.md
onboarding.sections.smartSummary.descrip:
Make context clear again.
When a discussion grows long and information scatters, AI Summary brings the key conclusions and open questions back into view.
onboarding.sections.smartSummary.label: AI Summary
onboarding.sections.smartSummary.title: Summarize multiple group chats in one click
onboarding.sections.subspaces.descriptio:
Subspaces are for focusing on specific problems and analyzing them in depth.
When a conversation becomes crowded, open a subspace for one task instead of repeatedly searching the message flow.
You, your teammates, and your respective AI Agents can stay focused on that one piece of work without being interrupted by other topics.
onboarding.sections.subspaces.label: Subspaces
onboarding.sections.subspaces.title: Move tasks into subspaces
onboarding.sections.webhook.description:
When something happens, the external system proactively notifies Octo.
Use Webhooks to connect GitHub, alerting platforms, and other external systems, and new events will be sent automatically to Octo.
onboarding.sections.webhook.label: Webhook
onboarding.sections.webhook.title: Use Webhooks so important updates do not wait to be forwarded
onboarding.sections.workspace.descriptio:
Octo keeps familiar ways of chatting while letting work live beyond messages.
People, materials, collaboration rules, and AI come together in one workspace.
Your AI Agents also work from this same context.
onboarding.sections.workspace.label: Workspace
onboarding.sections.workspace.title: How Octo organizes work
spaceCreate.createFailedRetry: Failed to create. Please try again.
spaceCreate.inviteTip: Space created. Share this link to invite members:
spaceGate.subtitle: Join a team or create a new workspace
